news.title: India's gold jewellery demand revives as prices stabilise; festive orders pick up: WGC
news.description: India's gold jewellery demand is showing signs of recovery as stable prices and retailer discounts draw consumers back to stores, the World Gold Council said. Festive season orders have begun picking up, while gold ETF inflows and digital gold purchases also rebounded despite weaker demand for bars

news.title: Wall Street banks are having their best trading year since 2009. Does that mean a crash is coming?
news.description: Wall Street banks are on track for record trading revenue, driven by AI investing, dealmaking and active markets rather than crisis conditions. While profits remain strong, analysts caution that crowded AI trades, rising volatility and inflation risks could challenge markets later in 2026.

news.title: Sebi warns listed firms, regulated entities against rising 'Boss Scam' cyber fraud
news.description: Sebi has issued a warning to all regulated entities regarding a rising cyber fraud known as the 'Boss Scam'.
